steps.title: Use the vertex formula
steps.content:
The quadratic opens upward because $a=18$ is positive, so its minimum occurs at the vertex. For $f(x)=ax^2+bx+c$, the vertex x-coordinate is
$$x=-\frac{b}{2a}$$

steps.title: Substitute the coefficients
steps.content:
Here, $a=18$ and $b=-45$. Substitute these values into the formula.
$$x=-\frac{-45}{2(18)}=\frac{45}{36}=\frac{5}{4}$$

steps.title: Convert to decimal form
steps.content:
Convert the fraction to match the listed choices.
$$\frac{5}{4}=1.25$$
The answer is A.
